Mohammed Al-Owais.bio: One of the most experienced goalkeepers in Saudi Arabian football, Al-Owais has been a mainstay between the posts for Al-Hilal and the national team for years. His heroic performances at the 2022 World Cup, particularly in the historic victory over Argentina, cemented his status as a Saudi football legend.
Mohammed Al-Owais.playingStyle: Athletic, commanding goalkeeper with excellent reflexes, brave shot-stopping ability, and the willingness to come off his line to sweep up danger behind the defense
keyStrengths: Bravery and willingness to come off his line
Experience in World Cup and continental competition
Mohammed Al-Owais.worldCup2026Role: Starting goalkeeper and a proven World Cup performer; his experience from Qatar 2022 gives Saudi Arabia a confident, battle-tested last line of defense
Mohammed Al-Owais.notableFact: Was the starting goalkeeper in Saudi Arabia's legendary 2-1 victory over Argentina at the 2022 World Cup, one of the biggest upsets in World Cup history

Sultan Al-Ghannam.bio: A dependable right-back who has been a consistent fixture in the Saudi national team for years. Al-Ghannam's tactical discipline, defensive reliability, and experience at Al-Nassr alongside Cristiano Ronaldo have elevated his game and made him one of Saudi Arabia's most trusted defenders.
Sultan Al-Ghannam.playingStyle: Disciplined, tactically aware right-back who positions himself well defensively, provides width in attack when needed, and maintains excellent team structure
keyStrengths: Consistent performances at the highest domestic level
Sultan Al-Ghannam.worldCup2026Role: Experienced right-back providing defensive stability and squad depth; his years of service and understanding of the national team system make him a reliable option
Sultan Al-Ghannam.notableFact: Has played alongside Cristiano Ronaldo at Al-Nassr, gaining invaluable experience of playing with one of the greatest footballers in history

Abdullah Madu.bio: A commanding center-back and defensive leader who has been a pillar of both Al-Nassr and the Saudi national team. Madu's aerial dominance, defensive organization, and leadership qualities have made him one of the most respected defenders in Saudi Arabian football history.
Abdullah Madu.playingStyle: Strong, commanding center-back who excels in aerial duels, organizes the defensive line with vocal communication, and provides the defensive foundation through excellent positioning
Abdullah Madu.worldCup2026Role: Experienced center-back and defensive leader whose aerial ability and organization anchor Saudi Arabia's backline; his veteran presence steadies the defense in high-pressure moments
Abdullah Madu.notableFact: Has been a stalwart of Saudi Arabian football for many years and was part of the squad that achieved the historic victory over Argentina at the 2022 World Cup

Abdulelah Al-Amri.bio: A young, athletic center-back who has established himself at Al-Nassr alongside world-class players. Al-Amri's speed, physicality, and improving tactical awareness have made him one of Saudi Arabia's most promising defenders and a key figure in their World Cup plans.
Abdulelah Al-Amri.playingStyle: Athletic, modern center-back with excellent pace for a defender, strong tackling ability, and the physical attributes to compete with the world's best strikers
Abdulelah Al-Amri.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back whose pace and athleticism provide Saudi Arabia with a modern defensive option capable of dealing with fast, counter-attacking opponents
Abdulelah Al-Amri.notableFact: Has developed rapidly at Al-Nassr, where training alongside Cristiano Ronaldo and other international stars has accelerated his growth into one of Saudi Arabia's best defenders

Ali Al-Bulaihi.bio: A veteran defender and one of the most colorful characters in Saudi Arabian football, Al-Bulaihi is known for his passionate, aggressive defending and his ability to wind up opposing strikers. His decades-long career with Al-Hilal and the national team has made him a beloved figure among Saudi fans.
Ali Al-Bulaihi.playingStyle: Aggressive, combative center-back who defends with maximum intensity, uses gamesmanship and physicality to unsettle opponents, and brings an infectious competitive fire to every match
keyStrengths: Gamesmanship and ability to unsettle opponents
Ali Al-Bulaihi.worldCup2026Role: Veteran defensive character whose aggressive defending and passionate leadership provide Saudi Arabia with an emotional spark and a defensive warrior willing to put his body on the line
Ali Al-Bulaihi.notableFact: Became a viral sensation at the 2022 World Cup for his passionate celebrations and aggressive defending during the historic victory over Argentina

Salman Al-Faraj.bio: The captain of Saudi Arabia and one of the most decorated players in the country's football history, Al-Faraj is a cultured midfielder whose passing range, set-piece delivery, and leadership have been the heartbeat of the national team for over a decade. His status in Saudi football transcends the sport.
Salman Al-Faraj.playingStyle: Elegant, left-footed midfielder with outstanding passing range, excellent set-piece delivery, and the composure and authority to control the tempo of matches from the center of the pitch
Salman Al-Faraj.worldCup2026Role: Captain and midfield general whose experience, leadership, and passing quality set the tone for Saudi Arabia's play; his presence on the pitch elevates the entire team
Salman Al-Faraj.notableFact: Has captained Saudi Arabia for many years and is one of the most capped players in the nation's history, representing the country in multiple World Cups and Asian Cups

Abdulrahman Al-Aboud.bio: A pacy right winger who has been a useful attacking option for Saudi Arabia with his directness and speed. Al-Aboud's ability to stretch defenses and deliver crosses from the right flank has earned him regular inclusion in the national team setup.
Abdulrahman Al-Aboud.playingStyle: Quick, direct right winger who uses his pace to beat defenders, delivers crosses into dangerous areas, and provides width to stretch opposition defenses
keyStrengths: Pace and directness on the right wing
Ability to stretch defenses with runs in behind
Abdulrahman Al-Aboud.worldCup2026Role: Wide attacking option providing pace and directness from the right flank; his ability to stretch defenses creates space for Saudi Arabia's more creative players to operate
Abdulrahman Al-Aboud.notableFact: Has been a consistent contributor from the right wing for Al-Ittihad and the national team, using his pace to trouble defenders across multiple qualifying campaigns

Abdulrahman Ghareeb.bio: A tricky left winger with excellent dribbling ability and the skill to create chances from wide positions. Ghareeb's technical quality and ability to beat defenders one-on-one have made him one of Saudi Arabia's most dangerous attacking players on his day.
Abdulrahman Ghareeb.playingStyle: Skilful, quick left winger who excels at dribbling past defenders, cutting inside to create shooting opportunities, and using his low center of gravity to maintain balance under pressure
keyStrengths: Dribbling ability and skill on the ball
Quick feet and ability to beat defenders
Creativity and chance creation from wide areas
Abdulrahman Ghareeb.worldCup2026Role: Creative wide attacker who can unlock defenses with individual skill; his dribbling and directness provide Saudi Arabia with an unpredictable attacking threat from the left wing
Abdulrahman Ghareeb.notableFact: Has been one of the standout performers in the Saudi Pro League with Al-Ahli, earning recognition as one of the most technically gifted Saudi players of his generation

Firas Al-Buraikan.bio: The spearhead of Saudi Arabia's attack and one of the most prolific young strikers in Saudi football, Al-Buraikan combines pace, power, and clinical finishing to devastating effect. His goal-scoring record for both Al-Nassr and the national team has established him as the country's primary attacking threat for the 2026 World Cup.
Firas Al-Buraikan.playingStyle: Quick, powerful striker with explosive acceleration, clinical finishing with both feet, and the intelligent movement to find space behind defenses and create goal-scoring opportunities
Firas Al-Buraikan.worldCup2026Role: Starting striker and Saudi Arabia's primary goalscoring threat; his pace, power, and finishing quality make him the player opponents will fear most and the key to Saudi Arabia's attacking ambitions
Firas Al-Buraikan.notableFact: Has become one of the most prolific Saudi strikers of his generation, consistently scoring goals in both the Saudi Pro League and international competition at a remarkable rate

Salem Al-Dawsari.bio: A Saudi Arabian football icon and the hero of the nation's greatest World Cup moment. Al-Dawsari's stunning curling goal against Argentina at the 2022 World Cup sent shockwaves through world football and cemented his status as one of the greatest Saudi players in history. A brilliant left winger with flair, creativity, and a knack for the spectacular, he remains Saudi Arabia's talisman.
Salem Al-Dawsari.playingStyle: Creative, technically brilliant left winger with outstanding dribbling, a devastating curling shot with his right foot, and the ability to produce moments of individual magic that can decide the biggest matches
keyStrengths: Stunning curling shot and shooting from distance
Big-game mentality and ability to perform on the biggest stages
Salem Al-Dawsari.worldCup2026Role: The talisman, the star, and Saudi Arabia's most dangerous player; his ability to produce moments of magic makes him the player who can single-handedly change a match, and all of Saudi Arabia's attacking plans revolve around getting the best from him
Salem Al-Dawsari.notableFact: Scored the winning goal in Saudi Arabia's legendary 2-1 victory over Argentina at the 2022 World Cup with a stunning curling strike, one of the most iconic goals in World Cup history

Hatan Bahbri.bio: An experienced right winger who has been a consistent performer for Saudi Arabia over many years. Bahbri's left-footed quality from the right side, crossing ability, and experience make him a trusted member of the squad who can be relied upon to deliver in important moments.
Hatan Bahbri.playingStyle: Experienced, left-footed right winger who cuts inside to create shooting opportunities, delivers quality set pieces, and provides intelligent movement in the final third
keyStrengths: Left-footed quality cutting in from the right
Hatan Bahbri.worldCup2026Role: Experienced wide attacker providing reliable contributions from the right wing; his left-footed quality and set-piece ability add valuable tactical options to Saudi Arabia's attack
Hatan Bahbri.notableFact: Has been part of the Saudi national team setup for many years and was part of the squad at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar, contributing to one of the tournament's greatest stories

Fawaz Al-Qarni.bio: A reliable backup goalkeeper who has provided dependable competition for the number one spot throughout Saudi Arabia's qualifying campaign. Al-Qarni's consistency, experience, and professionalism have made him a valued member of the squad even without regular starting opportunities.
Fawaz Al-Qarni.playingStyle: Solid, dependable goalkeeper with good positioning, safe handling, and the experience to step in and perform when called upon without any drop in confidence or reliability
Fawaz Al-Qarni.worldCup2026Role: Second-choice goalkeeper providing experienced depth; his professionalism and readiness to play ensure Saudi Arabia have no concerns about their goalkeeping backup
Fawaz Al-Qarni.notableFact: Has been a loyal servant to Saudi Arabian football as a reliable backup goalkeeper, maintaining his professionalism and readiness despite limited starting opportunities

Yasser Al-Shahrani.bio: A dynamic, attacking left-back who has been one of Saudi Arabia's most important players for over a decade. Al-Shahrani's overlapping runs, crossing ability, and tireless energy have made him one of the best fullbacks in Asian football, though his career was interrupted by a serious injury at the 2022 World Cup.
Yasser Al-Shahrani.playingStyle: Dynamic, attacking left-back with exceptional stamina, constant overlapping runs, quality crossing, and the speed to recover defensively after bombing forward
keyStrengths: Tireless energy and constant overlapping runs
Yasser Al-Shahrani.worldCup2026Role: Experienced left-back whose attacking threat and energy from fullback provide Saudi Arabia with one of their most potent attacking outlets; his return from injury adds enormous value
Yasser Al-Shahrani.notableFact: Suffered a serious collision injury during the 2022 World Cup match against Argentina that required emergency medical attention, but has fought back to reclaim his place in the squad

Abdullah Otayf.bio: A veteran midfielder who has been a consistent presence in both Al-Hilal's and Saudi Arabia's midfield for many years. Otayf's work rate, tactical intelligence, and ability to cover ground efficiently have made him a trusted member of the national team setup across multiple tournaments.
Abdullah Otayf.playingStyle: Hardworking, intelligent central midfielder who covers enormous amounts of ground, provides defensive cover, and links play efficiently with neat, simple passing
Abdullah Otayf.worldCup2026Role: Experienced midfield rotation option providing reliability and work rate; his ability to cover ground and maintain team shape makes him ideal for managing matches and protecting leads
Abdullah Otayf.notableFact: Has been a loyal servant to both Al-Hilal and the national team for many years, accumulating over 50 caps through consistent and reliable performances

Nasser Al-Dawsari.bio: A dynamic young midfielder who has broken into the Al-Hilal and Saudi Arabia squads with impressive performances. Despite sharing a surname with the legendary Salem Al-Dawsari, Nasser has established his own identity through his energy, passing ability, and growing influence in the center of the pitch.
Nasser Al-Dawsari.playingStyle: Dynamic, technically skilled young midfielder with good passing range, energetic running, and the ability to contribute at both ends of the pitch with late runs into the box
keyStrengths: Ability to arrive late in the box for goals
Nasser Al-Dawsari.worldCup2026Role: Young midfield talent whose energy and technical quality provide Saudi Arabia with a dynamic option in the center; his potential to develop into a key player makes him an exciting squad member
Nasser Al-Dawsari.notableFact: Has emerged as one of the brightest young midfield talents at Al-Hilal, one of Asia's biggest clubs, and represents the next generation of Saudi Arabian midfield talent

Saud Abdulhamid.bio: A groundbreaking figure in Saudi Arabian football, Saud Abdulhamid made history by becoming the first Saudi player to play in Serie A when he joined Roma. His pace, attacking threat from right-back, and ability to compete at the highest European level have made him the most valuable Saudi player and a symbol of the country's footballing ambitions on the world stage.
Saud Abdulhamid.playingStyle: Explosive, attacking right-back with blistering pace, dynamic overlapping runs, and the technical quality to deliver crosses and contribute to attacks at the highest level of European football
keyStrengths: Explosive pace and dynamic attacking runs
Technical quality at the European level
Ability to compete in Serie A against world-class opponents
Saud Abdulhamid.worldCup2026Role: Starting right-back and Saudi Arabia's most high-profile player; his Serie A experience and attacking dynamism give Saudi Arabia a genuine quality injection and a player who can compete with anyone at the World Cup
Saud Abdulhamid.notableFact: Made history as the first Saudi Arabian player to play in Serie A when he signed for AS Roma, breaking new ground for Saudi football in one of Europe's most prestigious leagues

Hassan Al-Tambakti.bio: A young, athletic center-back who has been developing rapidly in the Saudi Pro League with Al-Shabab. Al-Tambakti's pace, physicality, and improving tactical awareness have made him one of the most promising young defenders in Saudi Arabian football.
Hassan Al-Tambakti.playingStyle: Athletic, pacy center-back with strong physical attributes, improving positional awareness, and the speed to recover and deal with fast attackers who try to run in behind
keyStrengths: Pace and athletic ability for a center-back
Hassan Al-Tambakti.worldCup2026Role: Young center-back option whose pace and athleticism give Saudi Arabia a modern defensive profile; his development makes him an important piece of both the current World Cup squad and future plans
Hassan Al-Tambakti.notableFact: Has been one of the fastest-developing young defenders in the Saudi Pro League, earning regular national team call-ups through his impressive athletic performances

Nawaf Al-Abed.bio: One of the most experienced and technically gifted midfielders in Saudi Arabian football history, Al-Abed has been a fixture in the national team for well over a decade. His technical quality, set-piece expertise, and understanding of the game have made him a veteran leader who still contributes with quality at the highest level.
Nawaf Al-Abed.playingStyle: Technically refined, experienced attacking midfielder with excellent set-piece delivery, precise through balls, and the game intelligence to find pockets of space and create chances
Nawaf Al-Abed.worldCup2026Role: Veteran creative option whose set-piece expertise and experience add tactical dimensions; his ability to deliver from dead-ball situations could prove decisive in tight World Cup matches
Nawaf Al-Abed.notableFact: Scored what is believed to be one of the fastest goals in football history, timing reports of which have varied, during a Saudi Pro League match, showcasing his ability to produce the unexpected

Haitham Asiri.bio: A young, exciting left winger who has been one of the brightest emerging talents in the Saudi Pro League. Asiri's pace, dribbling ability, and direct running have made him a regular threat from the left side and earned him a growing role in the national team setup.
Haitham Asiri.playingStyle: Quick, direct left winger with good dribbling ability, the pace to beat defenders in one-on-one situations, and an improving end product in terms of crossing and shooting
keyStrengths: Pace and dribbling on the left wing
Directness and willingness to take on defenders
Haitham Asiri.worldCup2026Role: Young attacking option providing pace and directness from the left wing; his ability to stretch defenses and create opportunities through individual skill makes him a valuable impact substitute
Haitham Asiri.notableFact: Has been one of the standout young performers in the Saudi Pro League with Al-Ahli, earning recognition as part of the exciting new generation of Saudi attacking talent

Abdulrahman Al-Obaid.bio: A solid, reliable center-back who has been a consistent performer in the Saudi Pro League with Al-Shabab. Al-Obaid's defensive fundamentals, aerial ability, and squad contribution have earned him a place in Saudi Arabia's World Cup squad as experienced defensive depth.
Abdulrahman Al-Obaid.playingStyle: Solid, reliable center-back with good aerial ability, clean tackling, and the defensive fundamentals to perform consistently when called upon in the backline
Abdulrahman Al-Obaid.worldCup2026Role: Center-back depth option providing experienced defensive cover; his reliability and understanding of the team's defensive system make him a trustworthy backup when needed
Abdulrahman Al-Obaid.notableFact: Has been a dependable member of Al-Shabab's defense in the Saudi Pro League and has contributed to the national team's defensive stability across multiple qualifying campaigns

Mohammed Al-Rubaie.bio: A young goalkeeper who has been developing his skills in the Saudi Pro League with Al-Ahli. Al-Rubaie's potential, athletic ability, and growing experience have earned him recognition as one of Saudi Arabia's goalkeeping prospects for the future.
Mohammed Al-Rubaie.playingStyle: Athletic, developing young goalkeeper with good reflexes, improving distribution, and the potential to grow into a future first-choice goalkeeper for Saudi Arabia
keyStrengths: Growth potential and hunger to improve
Mohammed Al-Rubaie.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper gaining World Cup experience; his inclusion signals Saudi Arabia's investment in developing the next generation of goalkeeping talent for future tournaments
Mohammed Al-Rubaie.notableFact: Has been developing at Al-Ahli in the Saudi Pro League, one of the country's top clubs, and represents the future of Saudi Arabian goalkeeping

Mohammed Kanno.bio: A powerful, box-to-box midfielder who has been one of the most important players in Saudi Arabian football for many years. Kanno's physicality, aerial ability, and capacity to score from midfield have made him an integral part of both Al-Hilal and the national team, and his partnership with Salman Al-Faraj forms the spine of Saudi Arabia's midfield.
Mohammed Kanno.playingStyle: Powerful, box-to-box midfielder with exceptional physical attributes, strong aerial ability, the stamina to dominate large areas of the pitch, and a knack for arriving late in the box to score goals
keyStrengths: Physical power and aerial dominance in midfield
Mohammed Kanno.worldCup2026Role: Starting midfielder whose physical power and aerial dominance give Saudi Arabia a commanding presence in the engine room; his ability to score from midfield adds a crucial attacking dimension
Mohammed Kanno.notableFact: Has been a crucial member of Al-Hilal's dominance in Asian club football and brings enormous experience from AFC Champions League campaigns to the World Cup stage

Ayman Yahya.bio: A talented young striker who has been making waves in the Saudi Pro League with Al-Nassr. Yahya's technical ability, composure in front of goal, and intelligent movement have earned him early international recognition as one of Saudi Arabia's most promising attacking talents.
Ayman Yahya.playingStyle: Technically gifted young striker with intelligent movement, composure in front of goal, and the ability to score a variety of goals through good positioning and clinical finishing
Ayman Yahya.worldCup2026Role: Young striking option whose technical quality and composure provide Saudi Arabia with a different attacking option; his development trajectory suggests he could be a key player at this and future World Cups
Ayman Yahya.notableFact: Has developed at Al-Nassr alongside Cristiano Ronaldo, learning from one of the greatest goalscorers in football history and accelerating his development as a striker

Ali Lajami.bio: A tall, powerful center-back who has been a consistent performer in the Saudi Pro League with Al-Ahli. Lajami's aerial dominance, physical presence, and defensive reliability have earned him a role in the national team as strong defensive depth in the center-back position.
Ali Lajami.playingStyle: Tall, physically imposing center-back who dominates in aerial duels, uses his strength to marshal attackers, and provides a commanding presence at set pieces both defensively and offensively
Ali Lajami.worldCup2026Role: Center-back depth option whose aerial ability makes him particularly valuable at set pieces; his physical presence gives the coaching staff a different defensive option against physical opponents
Ali Lajami.notableFact: Has established himself as one of the most dependable center-backs in the Saudi Pro League with Al-Ahli, earning his place in the World Cup squad through consistent domestic performances

Khalid Al-Ghannam.bio: An exciting young right winger who has been emerging at Al-Nassr and in the national team. The younger Al-Ghannam brings pace, flair, and youthful exuberance to Saudi Arabia's attack, and his potential has been recognized with early international call-ups.
Khalid Al-Ghannam.playingStyle: Quick, exciting young winger with good dribbling ability, pace to burn, and the fearlessness of youth that sees him take on defenders without hesitation
keyStrengths: Fearlessness and willingness to take on defenders
Khalid Al-Ghannam.worldCup2026Role: Young attacking talent whose pace and dribbling make him an exciting option off the bench; his fearlessness and energy could prove valuable as an impact substitute against tiring defenses
Khalid Al-Ghannam.notableFact: Has been developing at Al-Nassr alongside top international talent and represents the exciting next generation of Saudi Arabian attacking players

Musab Al-Juwayr.bio: A young and talented striker who has been rising through the ranks at Al-Hilal, one of Asia's biggest clubs. Al-Juwayr's pace, movement, and goal-scoring instincts have earned him early international recognition as Saudi Arabia builds depth in their striking department.
Musab Al-Juwayr.playingStyle: Quick, mobile young striker with good movement off the ball, clinical finishing instincts, and the pace to exploit spaces behind opposing defenses on the counter-attack
Musab Al-Juwayr.worldCup2026Role: Young forward option providing pace and goal threat off the bench; his development at Al-Hilal and his clinical instincts make him an exciting prospect for Saudi Arabia's World Cup campaign
Musab Al-Juwayr.notableFact: Has been developing at Al-Hilal, one of the most successful clubs in Asian football history, and represents the latest in a long line of talented strikers produced by the Saudi club system
